item.name: 61. Code contains spaces (not allowed)
item.description: 61. Code contains spaces (not allowed)

item.name: 62. Code starts with a restricted character (-)
item.description: 62. Code starts with a restricted character (-)

item.name: 63. Code ends with a restricted character (-)
item.description: 63. Code ends with a restricted character (-)

item.name: 64. Code starts and ends with an underscore (not allowed)
item.description: 64. Code starts and ends with an underscore (not allowed)

item.name: 65. Code contains special characters not allowed (!@#$)
item.description: 65. Code contains special characters not allowed (!@#$)

item.name: 66. Code includes lowercase letters (must be uppercase)
item.description: 66. Code includes lowercase letters (must be uppercase)

item.name: 67. Code exceeds max length (31 characters)
item.description: 67. Code exceeds max length (31 characters)

item.name: 68. Code below min length (less than 5 characters)
item.description: 68. Code below min length (less than 5 characters)

item.name: 69. Code contains an emoji (not allowed)
item.description: 69. Code contains an emoji (not allowed)

item.name: 70. Code contains only spaces (completely invalid)
item.description: 70. Code contains only spaces (completely invalid)

item.name: 71. Code has an invalid separator (not listed)
item.description: 71. Code has an invalid separator (not listed)

item.name: 72. Code contains an apostrophe (not allowed)
item.description: 72. Code contains an apostrophe (not allowed)

item.name: 73. Code starts with a plus sign (not allowed)
item.description: 73. Code starts with a plus sign (not allowed)

item.name: 74. Code ends with a plus sign (not allowed)
item.description: 74. Code ends with a plus sign (not allowed)

item.name: 75. Code starts with an equal sign (not allowed)
item.description: 75. Code starts with an equal sign (not allowed)

item.name: 76. Code ends with an equal sign (not allowed)
item.description: 76. Code ends with an equal sign (not allowed)

item.name: 77. Code contains prohibited symbols (*&)
item.description: 77. Code contains prohibited symbols (*&)

item.name: 78. Code starts with a backslash (not allowed)
item.description: 78. Code starts with a backslash (not allowed)

item.name: 79. Code ends with a forward slash (not allowed)
item.description: 79. Code ends with a forward slash (not allowed)

item.name: 80. Code contains mixed uppercase and lowercase letters (invalid)
item.description: 80. Code contains mixed uppercase and lowercase letters (invalid)

item.name: 81. Code contains double spaces (not allowed)
item.description: 81. Code contains double spaces (not allowed)

item.name: 82. Code contains a newline character (invalid)
item.description: 82. Code contains a newline character (invalid)

item.name: 83. Code contains a tab character (invalid)
item.description: 83. Code contains a tab character (invalid)

item.name: 84. Code has a non-Latin, non-Cyrillic character
item.description: 84. Code has a non-Latin, non-Cyrillic character

item.name: 85. Code has a mix of invalid and valid separators
item.description: 85. Code has a mix of invalid and valid separators

item.name: 86. Code uses single quotes (not allowed)
item.description: 86. Code uses single quotes (not allowed)

item.name: 87. Code contains square brackets (not allowed)
item.description: 87. Code contains square brackets (not allowed)

item.name: 88. Code contains curly brackets (not allowed)
item.description: 88. Code contains curly brackets (not allowed)

item.name: 89. Code has consecutive dashes (not allowed)
item.description: 89. Code has consecutive dashes (not allowed)

item.name: 90. Code has only punctuation (not allowed)
item.description: 90. Code has only punctuation (not allowed)

item.name: 91. Code contains an invalid character sequence
item.description: 91. Code contains an invalid character sequence

item.name: 92. Code has an embedded space within valid characters
item.description: 92. Code has an embedded space within valid characters

item.name: 93. Code starts with a forbidden vendor prefix
item.description: 93. Code starts with a forbidden vendor prefix

item.name: 94. Code is a random special character string
item.description: 94. Code is a random special character string

item.name: 95. Code contains an invisible Unicode character
item.description: 95. Code contains an invisible Unicode character

item.name: 96. Code is made up of only numbers but exceeds 30 characters
item.description: 96. Code is made up of only numbers but exceeds 30 characters

item.name: 97. Code includes a mix of uppercase, lowercase, and symbols
item.description: 97. Code includes a mix of uppercase, lowercase, and symbols

item.name: 98. Code uses comma as a separator incorrectly
item.description: 98. Code uses comma as a separator incorrectly

item.name: 99. Code is completely empty (invalid)
item.description: 99. Code is completely empty (invalid)

item.name: 100. Code contains an SQL injection attempt (security issue)
item.description: 100. Code contains an SQL injection attempt (security issue)

item.name: 100. Code contains an SQL injection attempt (security issue)
item.description: 100. Code contains an SQL injection attempt (security issue)
